hero.designNotes: Celestial Night theme for Kavya & Mihir's Gujarati wedding. The hero uses a deep midnight-indigo radial gradient sky layered with three animated CSS starfield tiers that twinkle at different intervals, plus soft purple and amber glow orbs that pulse to create atmospheric depth. Typography is asymmetrically weighted: the bride's name "Kavya" renders in a warm rose-pink gradient while "Mihir" glows in burnished gold, both set in Playfair Display at display scale, connected by a Cormorant Garamond italic ampersand in a golden SVG gradient. Cultural elements include a rotating SVG mandala on the left column, a CSS toran (hanging leaf garland) on the right column, an animated diya SVG flame in the section divider, and floating marigold-orange petal shapes. A scrolling marquee footer band lists the wedding events. The full-bleed layout uses a three-column CSS grid with side vertical label elements that collapse gracefully at 640px. All decorative columns hide on mobile to centre-focus the typographic hero. CTA button uses a glass-morphism treatment with a gradient hover glow. No external images or scripts required.
